news_items.headline: Trump says U.S. and Iran are 'in negotiations right now,' Tehran is 'talking sense'
Kuwait says Strait of Hormuz closure is beyond catastrophic, will trigger domino effect across global economy
news_items.description: Iran is holding the world economy hostage by blockading the Strait of Hormuz, said Shaikh Nawaf Al-Sabah, the CEO of Kuwait Petroleum Corporation.

news_items.headline: Strait of Hormuz tanker traffic won't return to normal for months, Kalshi bettors predict
news_items.description: Prediction market bettors aren't confident that the vital Middle Eastern oil passageway will reopen anytime soon.

news_items.headline: Pakistan offers to facilitate U.S.-Iran war talks as Trump, Tehran give mixed signals
news_items.description: Trump said top U.S. negotiators and their Iranian counterparts have been engaged in "very, very strong talks," but Tehran has denied that claim.

news_items.headline: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
news_items.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.

news_items.headline: As Iran war causes gas and airfares to spike, lawmakers warn of price gouging — but experts point to supply shocks
news_items.description: With airfares and gas prices spiking, some lawmakers are warning of the potential for price gouging, even as experts point to extreme supply shocks.

news_items.headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Tuesday
news_items.description: The rally in oil prices has resumed, and close Nvidia partner Arm Holdings is hosting an AI computing event.

news_items.headline: Senate rejects latest push to rein in Trump's powers in Iran as war's off-ramp unclear
news_items.description: Democrats have vowed to keep forcing votes on the issue as they seek public testimony from administration officials.

news_items.headline: Trump says Iran gave U.S. "a very big present" related to oil and gas
news_items.description: Even as Iran launched missiles towards Israel and other Gulf nations, President Trump claimed the regime is so near defeat that it has no choice but to negotiat...

news_items.headline: U.S. expected to deploy troops from 82nd Airborne Division to Middle East
news_items.description: President Trump claimed Tuesday that the U.S. is already in direct negotiations with Iran and that the country has agreed never to have a nuclear weapon. Meanwh...
